author: Dmitry Iv.
message: 2.6.8 — encoder construction waits for metadata: save('*.mp3') on a fresh file source read channels before decode reported them (encoder defaulted stereo, threw on mono — the README's own flagship line); +regression (fix-meta 13)

author: Dmitry Iv.
message: 2.6.7 — whole-render ops on file sources wait decode out: LOAD awaits full decode when the chain carries a streaming:false atom (read() returned 0 samples mid-decode); save() live-stream shortcut excludes whole-op chains + total deferred past the plan getter; compilePlan whole branch tolerates the empty mid-decode timeline (crashed on undefined bus). Found by running the org-profile snippets cold; +regression (675/1840)

author: Dmitry Iv.
message: worker delta test: await full decode (thenable), then drain — ready is metadata-level; slow runners keep decoding (and emitting deltas) past ready: 56/87 blocks at assert on ubuntu, green locally

author: Dmitry Iv.
message: worker delta test: settle until deltas cover all blocks — ready could resolve before trailing delta messages on slow runners (same ordering class as wam's offline-render fix); was 3/3 red on CI, green locally

author: Dmitry Iv.
message:
Fix @audio/decode missing from dependencies (runtime import in core.js)

Registry install of 2.6.0 fails to resolve it — the dev tree masked the
gap via devDependencies. Guard the class: test asserts every runtime
import of shipped files is a declared dependency.

author: Dmitry Iv.
message: Update todo.md

author: Dmitry Iv.
message:
testing gaps closed: stream≡read (pitch spectral, dither statistical), push-source op coverage, FATE-style stored references, docs-coverage enforcement

- pitch: ranged read vs full-read slice — Goertzel target-dominance (zc overcounts on
  phasy vocoder output at non-octave ratios; pitch(5) verified spectrally exact)
- dither: pass-to-pass divergence ≤ 2.5 LSB, zero bias, TPDF bound vs source
- push sources: dither/pitch/stretch/mix post-stop + dither through a live stream
- plugin-fate.js: freeverb impulse→RT60 1.42s, delay echo spacing/decay=feedback,
  tremolo depth+rate via rms envelope, pinned FNV-1a checksum (deterministic chain)
- cli: every public op must have help + gerund label + README mention (enforced)

author: Dmitry Iv.
message: deps: fourier-transform 2.4.0, @audio/stretch-pvoc-lock 1.2.0 (sliding-stretch foundation)

author: Dmitry Iv.
message:
sliding stretch + per-block note feed

- stretch(t => f) / stretch({t, v}) — factor as fn/curve of source time: expand
  samples per 2048-sample quantum → piecewise-constant _stretch_seg segments
  (plan-time deterministic: ranged reads, seek, duration, serialization ride the
  segment algebra); _stretch_dsp drives the vocoder's live hop fn + a ring-position
  → quantum drain map (rate follows the content under the cursor, not wall time —
  FIFO-lag detune eliminated). Bit-exact stream≡read; ranged form; scalar path unchanged.
- adjustLimit integrates piecewise factors for progressive decode
- renderBlock/maxSrcSample: sorted-tiling binary search (piecewise plans emit
  thousands of segments; verified-once _sorted flag per segs array)
- per-block note feed for streaming instruments (contract §events): compiled note
  slots sliced per block, times rebased, pooled slots, seek-safe binary search;
  whole-render feed unchanged
- needs fourier-transform 2.4.0 + @audio/stretch-pvoc-lock 1.2.0
